author: Haroen Viaene
subject: refactor(pagination): simplify component further (#4986)
body:
* refactor(pagination): simplify component further

- default props aren't needed
- keys aren't needed
- className instead of additionalClassName
- simplify tests (still passed with previous implementation)
- deduplicate repetitive part of PaginationLink

* refactor(Pagination): inline `PaginationLink`

- Inline `PaginationLink` in `Pagination.tsx`
- Forward `createClickHandler()`

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>
